rows.notes: Selected 'Arrearages Brought up' from gemini-flash, as 'Arrearages' is a more accurate visual reading of the decorative script than 'Arracagia'. Both extractors agreed on row type and no amounts.
Consensus reached by both extractors on description, row type, and no monetary values.
Selected description from gemini-flash, as 'Gillington' is a clearer visual reading than 'Hidlington'. Monetary values (22/5/6) were agreed upon by both extractors.

Combined description, using 'Vicarage' (visually confirmed over 'Vicerage') and including the dash from gpt-5-mini. Both extractors correctly identified ditto marks and followed instructions to leave amounts blank, as no explicit numbers are present.
Consensus reached by both extractors on description, row type, and monetary values.

Combined description, using 'Vicarage' (visually confirmed over 'Vicerage') and including the dash from gpt-5-mini. Both extractors correctly identified ditto marks and followed instructions to leave amounts blank, as no explicit numbers are present.

Selected 'Mixed Rents Variable' from gpt-5-mini, as this is the clear visual reading of the header text, overriding gemini-flash's 'Tithe Rents Payable'.

Visually confirmed 'Gillington' (over 'Hidlington') and '18' shillings (over '10'). Pounds (210) and pence (9) were agreed. Values selected from gemini-flash for shillings and description, as confirmed by image.
Selected description from gemini-flash, as 'Fells' is a clearer visual reading than 'Mills' and the ampersand is visible. Monetary values (18/18/11) were agreed upon by both extractors.

Visually confirmed '113' pounds (over '115') and '0.75' fraction (over '0.25'). The fraction symbol closely matches other 3/4 representations on the page. Description, shillings, and pence were agreed.
Visually confirmed 'North Newington' (over 'South Newington') and '391' pounds (over '39'). Shillings, pence, and fraction were agreed.
Visually confirmed '0.5' fraction (over '0.75'), the symbol is a clear halfpenny mark. Omitted the dash in description from gpt-5-mini as it's not present. Pounds, shillings, and pence were agreed.
Visually confirmed 'Norton' (over 'Merton'). Monetary values were agreed upon by both extractors. Both extractors had good notes on the parenthetical text.
Visually confirmed 'Garsston' (over 'Yarnton'). Monetary values and fraction were agreed upon by both extractors.
Consensus reached by both extractors on description, row type, and monetary values.

Visually confirmed leading dashes '---' and '7' for pounds and shillings (over '4' for both). Pence was agreed.
